records.m_Talk_ENG: Under the Demon Lord's age of chaos, humanity vanishes, leaving only winter behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Under the Demon Lord's age of chaos, humanity vanishes, leaving only winter behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Under the Demon Lord's age of chaos, humanity vanishes, leaving only winter behind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Tree that whispers of the future stands broken, silent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Tree that whispers of the future stands broken, silent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Tree that whispers of the future stands broken, silent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was the end of the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was the end of the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was the end of the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It should have been.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It should have been.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It should have been.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The winter wind that freezes everything comes to a halt, and sprouts emerge from the earth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The winter wind that freezes everything comes to a halt, and sprouts emerge from the earth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The winter wind that freezes everything comes to a halt, and sprouts emerge from the earth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A new sun rises, and new life begins to stir.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A new sun rises, and new life begins to stir.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A new sun rises, and new life begins to stir.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And at its center is a girl embracing the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And at its center is a girl embracing the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And at its center is a girl embracing the Golden Tree.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What brings you here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What brings you here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What brings you here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to meet Ecclesia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to meet Ecclesia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to meet Ecclesia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She will be back soon, so please wait here for a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She will be back soon, so please wait here for a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She will be back soon, so please wait here for a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ecclesia is praying right now in the place she loves most.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ecclesia is praying right now in the place she loves most.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ecclesia is praying right now in the place she loves most.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sunniest place in the Promised Land. The hill of the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sunniest place in the Promised Land. The hill of the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sunniest place in the Promised Land. The hill of the Golden Tree.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are Ecclesia's father... aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are Ecclesia's father... aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are Ecclesia's father... aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How much do you know about her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How much do you know about her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How much do you know about her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: More than the memories of the <color=#ffd34c>other being</color> within you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: More than the memories of the <color=#ffd34c>other being</color> within you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: More than the memories of the <color=#ffd34c>other being</color> within you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You know Nequitia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You know Nequitia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You know Nequitia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know many things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know many things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know many things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Including the fact that the fates of two people are bound within you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Including the fact that the fates of two people are bound within you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Including the fact that the fates of two people are bound within you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that neither can accept the other, so both choose to look away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that neither can accept the other, so both choose to look away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that neither can accept the other, so both choose to look away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Then do you also know how we ended up here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Then do you also know how we ended up here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Then do you also know how we ended up here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is only one reason outsiders arrive here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is only one reason outsiders arrive here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is only one reason outsiders arrive here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because the Promised Land wished it so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because the Promised Land wished it so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because the Promised Land wished it so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I hope you, too, will find life in the Promised Land fulfilling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I hope you, too, will find life in the Promised Land fulfilling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I hope you, too, will find life in the Promised Land fulfilling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I'm enjoying a miracle-like peace I haven't felt in a long time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I'm enjoying a miracle-like peace I haven't felt in a long time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I'm enjoying a miracle-like peace I haven't felt in a long time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More than anything, I feel an undeserved gratitude for being able to see my mother again like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: More than anything, I feel an undeserved gratitude for being able to see my mother again like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: More than anything, I feel an undeserved gratitude for being able to see my mother again like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I have to go back. I can't keep dreaming of miracles forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I have to go back. I can't keep dreaming of miracles forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I have to go back. I can't keep dreaming of miracles forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Promised Land does not bar the way of those with resolve.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Promised Land does not bar the way of those with resolve.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Promised Land does not bar the way of those with resolve.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But do not drag that child into it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But do not drag that child into it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But do not drag that child into it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you planning to do with Ecclesia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you planning to do with Ecclesia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you planning to do with Ecclesia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As her father, I am only letting that child, weary from a long journey, rest in peace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As her father, I am only letting that child, weary from a long journey, rest in peace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As her father, I am only letting that child, weary from a long journey, rest in peace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Demon Lord Thagirion will come to our world before long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Demon Lord Thagirion will come to our world before long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Demon Lord Thagirion will come to our world before long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're from Elysion, then you know how dangerous a Demon Lord is. That's why I need your help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're from Elysion, then you know how dangerous a Demon Lord is. That's why I need your help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're from Elysion, then you know how dangerous a Demon Lord is. That's why I need your help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you mean to use Ecclesia as a sacrifice to stop that Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you mean to use Ecclesia as a sacrifice to stop that Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you mean to use Ecclesia as a sacrifice to stop that Demon Lord?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not a sacrifice. We're trying to join forces because our purpose is the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not a sacrifice. We're trying to join forces because our purpose is the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not a sacrifice. We're trying to join forces because our purpose is the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though it seemed like she herself had lost the memory of ever fighting alongside us... if I help her somehow, she'll remember.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though it seemed like she herself had lost the memory of ever fighting alongside us... if I help her somehow, she'll remember.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though it seemed like she herself had lost the memory of ever fighting alongside us... if I help her somehow, she'll remember.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Help her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Help her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Help her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That child has fought for a very long time to stop Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That child has fought for a very long time to stop Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That child has fought for a very long time to stop Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a lingering obsession, she wandered countless worlds through an eternity, and her soul was damaged beyond repair.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a lingering obsession, she wandered countless worlds through an eternity, and her soul was damaged beyond repair.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a lingering obsession, she wandered countless worlds through an eternity, and her soul was damaged beyond repair.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you truly wish to help her, then do not drag her into conflict any longer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you truly wish to help her, then do not drag her into conflict any longer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you truly wish to help her, then do not drag her into conflict any longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I understand what you're trying to say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I understand what you're trying to say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I understand what you're trying to say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But without her help, our world will collapse just like yours did.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But without her help, our world will collapse just like yours did.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But without her help, our world will collapse just like yours did.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The end of a world is an ordained course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The end of a world is an ordained course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The end of a world is an ordained course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is like pruning a branch that is no longer needed. No matter how many times you cut it, the next branch will grow again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is like pruning a branch that is no longer needed. No matter how many times you cut it, the next branch will grow again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is like pruning a branch that is no longer needed. No matter how many times you cut it, the next branch will grow again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think Ecclesia feels the same way?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think Ecclesia feels the same way?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think Ecclesia feels the same way?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone with enough pride to fight through an eternity at the cost of her own soul would give up just because she's tired?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone with enough pride to fight through an eternity at the cost of her own soul would give up just because she's tired?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone with enough pride to fight through an eternity at the cost of her own soul would give up just because she's tired?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're going to shackle her memories however you please and force her to live a false life?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're going to shackle her memories however you please and force her to live a false life?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're going to shackle her memories however you please and force her to live a false life?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because that is the only way to save her soul.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because that is the only way to save her soul.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because that is the only way to save her soul.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hear the Promised Land grants the wishes of its residents.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hear the Promised Land grants the wishes of its residents.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hear the Promised Land grants the wishes of its residents.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So is your wish to return Shadow Mors to the Ecclesia you loved?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So is your wish to return Shadow Mors to the Ecclesia you loved?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So is your wish to return Shadow Mors to the Ecclesia you loved?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
No. My wish is
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
No. My wish is
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
No. My wish is
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Father!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Father!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Father!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ecclesia? Back already?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ecclesia? Back already?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ecclesia? Back already?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look, Father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look, Father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look, Father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This fell from the sky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This fell from the sky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This fell from the sky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A snowflake...? It doesn't melt even in my hand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A snowflake...? It doesn't melt even in my hand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A snowflake...? It doesn't melt even in my hand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? I didn't even realize we had a guest...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? I didn't even realize we had a guest...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? I didn't even realize we had a guest...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll hurry and gather some fruit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll hurry and gather some fruit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll hurry and gather some fruit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That won't be necessary. She'll be leaving soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That won't be necessary. She'll be leaving soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That won't be necessary. She'll be leaving soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... is that so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... is that so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... is that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Hey, I
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Hey, I
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Hey, I
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we cannot send a guest of our home away empty-handed...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we cannot send a guest of our home away empty-handed...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we cannot send a guest of our home away empty-handed...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why don't you accompany her and bring in today's harvest together? Is that acceptable to you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why don't you accompany her and bring in today's harvest together? Is that acceptable to you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why don't you accompany her and bring in today's harvest together? Is that acceptable to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes! Then I'll go fetch the pole pruners!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes! Then I'll go fetch the pole pruners!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes! Then I'll go fetch the pole pruners!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I thought you'd try to stop me from meeting her. This is unexpected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I thought you'd try to stop me from meeting her. This is unexpected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I thought you'd try to stop me from meeting her. This is unexpected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A priest of the Promised Land does not sow the seeds of conflict.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A priest of the Promised Land does not sow the seeds of conflict.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A priest of the Promised Land does not sow the seeds of conflict.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have conveyed my will clearly enough, so from here on, I must leave it to your choice and that child's.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have conveyed my will clearly enough, so from here on, I must leave it to your choice and that child's.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have conveyed my will clearly enough, so from here on, I must leave it to your choice and that child's.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Promise me just one thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Promise me just one thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Promise me just one thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you cannot persuade that child by today, then promise you will trouble her no longer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you cannot persuade that child by today, then promise you will trouble her no longer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you cannot persuade that child by today, then promise you will trouble her no longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hn-hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hn-hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hn-hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come up quickly!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come up quickly!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come up quickly!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're... really good at climbing hills.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're... really good at climbing hills.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're... really good at climbing hills.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I climb this path every day, so of course I am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I climb this path every day, so of course I am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I climb this path every day, so of course I am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's my first time going out to harvest with someone else, so it's even more delightful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's my first time going out to harvest with someone else, so it's even more delightful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's my first time going out to harvest with someone else, so it's even more delightful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not like that! Put a little more strength into the end and cut it in one go!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not like that! Put a little more strength into the end and cut it in one go!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not like that! Put a little more strength into the end and cut it in one go!

records.m_Talk_ENG: L-like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: L-like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: L-like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Got it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Got it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Got it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well done.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well done.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well done.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Fruit on the high branches really is hard to pick.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Fruit on the high branches really is hard to pick.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Fruit on the high branches really is hard to pick.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It feels like we could just take the fruit that's fallen to the ground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It feels like we could just take the fruit that's fallen to the ground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It feels like we could just take the fruit that's fallen to the ground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The fruit a tree lets fall is the tree's way of repaying the Promised Land.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The fruit a tree lets fall is the tree's way of repaying the Promised Land.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The fruit a tree lets fall is the tree's way of repaying the Promised Land.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we mustn't touch it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we mustn't touch it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we mustn't touch it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The tree is repaying it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The tree is repaying it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The tree is repaying it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The earth gave it precious nourishment, so the tree diligently grows it and gives it back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The earth gave it precious nourishment, so the tree diligently grows it and gives it back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The earth gave it precious nourishment, so the tree diligently grows it and gives it back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, now that the same day repeats itself, perhaps it means nothing at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, now that the same day repeats itself, perhaps it means nothing at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, now that the same day repeats itself, perhaps it means nothing at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But someday, in a perfected Promised Land, we must not forget how to live in preparation for tomorrow instead of today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But someday, in a perfected Promised Land, we must not forget how to live in preparation for tomorrow instead of today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But someday, in a perfected Promised Land, we must not forget how to live in preparation for tomorrow instead of today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you don't intend to live only for today forever, either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you don't intend to live only for today forever, either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you don't intend to live only for today forever, either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To greet tomorrow... that is the wish of all the residents of the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To greet tomorrow... that is the wish of all the residents of the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To greet tomorrow... that is the wish of all the residents of the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because it is the one wish the Promised Land can't grant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because it is the one wish the Promised Land can't grant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because it is the one wish the Promised Land can't grant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ecclesia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ecclesia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ecclesia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know what it's like outside the Promised Land?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know what it's like outside the Promised Land?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know what it's like outside the Promised Land?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Beyond the Promised Land lies an eternal winter. I was told it is the trace of the end left behind by the Demon Lord Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Beyond the Promised Land lies an eternal winter. I was told it is the trace of the end left behind by the Demon Lord Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Beyond the Promised Land lies an eternal winter. I was told it is the trace of the end left behind by the Demon Lord Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not just a trace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not just a trace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not just a trace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Out there, even now, there are still people fighting the Demon Lord to survive that winter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Out there, even now, there are still people fighting the Demon Lord to survive that winter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Out there, even now, there are still people fighting the Demon Lord to survive that winter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That can't be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That can't be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That can't be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That can't be true. Surely every world except the Promised Land was long ago destroyed by Thagirion...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That can't be true. Surely every world except the Promised Land was long ago destroyed by Thagirion...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That can't be true. Surely every world except the Promised Land was long ago destroyed by Thagirion...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Thagirion had truly destroyed the world completely, then how could a place like the Promised Land remain this intact?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Thagirion had truly destroyed the world completely, then how could a place like the Promised Land remain this intact?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Thagirion had truly destroyed the world completely, then how could a place like the Promised Land remain this intact?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know why, but this one thing is certain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know why, but this one thing is certain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know why, but this one thing is certain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we fail to stop the Demon Lord Thagirion, this place too will soon collapse by her hand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we fail to stop the Demon Lord Thagirion, this place too will soon collapse by her hand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we fail to stop the Demon Lord Thagirion, this place too will soon collapse by her hand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Promised Land... by Thagirion's hand...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Promised Land... by Thagirion's hand...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Promised Land... by Thagirion's hand...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A dead Helgon becomes a monster called a Shadow, wandering with nothing left but a lingering obsession.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A dead Helgon becomes a monster called a Shadow, wandering with nothing left but a lingering obsession.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A dead Helgon becomes a monster called a Shadow, wandering with nothing left but a lingering obsession.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even after ending up that way, you were still someone who never lost your pride and struggled to stop Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even after ending up that way, you were still someone who never lost your pride and struggled to stop Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even after ending up that way, you were still someone who never lost your pride and struggled to stop Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just because your memories are gone doesn't mean that pride is gone too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just because your memories are gone doesn't mean that pride is gone too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just because your memories are gone doesn't mean that pride is gone too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what kind of person I was in the past...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what kind of person I was in the past...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what kind of person I was in the past...

records.m_Talk_ENG: but to me right now, nothing is more precious than the time I spend with my father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: but to me right now, nothing is more precious than the time I spend with my father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: but to me right now, nothing is more precious than the time I spend with my father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't wish to let go of what I have now in order to protect people I don't even remember.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't wish to let go of what I have now in order to protect people I don't even remember.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't wish to let go of what I have now in order to protect people I don't even remember.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not your own thought! Someone is covering your eyes and ears with false memories!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not your own thought! Someone is covering your eyes and ears with false memories!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not your own thought! Someone is covering your eyes and ears with false memories!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe that Veles guy did it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe that Veles guy did it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe that Veles guy did it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not insult my father!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not insult my father!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not insult my father!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please don't call this Promised Land I love... a lie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please don't call this Promised Land I love... a lie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please don't call this Promised Land I love... a lie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it... snowing right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it... snowing right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it... snowing right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: More is falling than before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: More is falling than before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: More is falling than before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... it has never snowed at this hour before...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... it has never snowed at this hour before...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... it has never snowed at this hour before...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's never fallen before?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's never fallen before?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's never fallen before?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The snowflakes don't melt, even in my hand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The snowflakes don't melt, even in my hand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The snowflakes don't melt, even in my hand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What... is this supposed to be a sign of?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What... is this supposed to be a sign of?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What... is this supposed to be a sign of?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...
records.m_Talk_DEU: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...
records.m_Talk_FRA: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The time promised by the Promised Land is coming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The time promised by the Promised Land is coming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The time promised by the Promised Land is coming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the fact that it is snowing now is the proof of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the fact that it is snowing now is the proof of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the fact that it is snowing now is the proof of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As if a cold awl buried deep within my subconscious had twitched.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As if a cold awl buried deep within my subconscious had twitched.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As if a cold awl buried deep within my subconscious had twitched.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A strange yet familiar sensation gouges straight through the center of my heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A strange yet familiar sensation gouges straight through the center of my heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A strange yet familiar sensation gouges straight through the center of my heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fear, hatred, kinship, guilt, regret, pity. And the massive wave of confusion born from all those clashing emotions...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fear, hatred, kinship, guilt, regret, pity. And the massive wave of confusion born from all those clashing emotions...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fear, hatred, kinship, guilt, regret, pity. And the massive wave of confusion born from all those clashing emotions...

records.m_Talk_ENG: pulled a name that had long lain sunken at the bottom of my memories up to the surface.
records.m_Talk_DEU: pulled a name that had long lain sunken at the bottom of my memories up to the surface.
records.m_Talk_FRA: pulled a name that had long lain sunken at the bottom of my memories up to the surface.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Audra.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Audra.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Audra.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Under the Demon Lord's age of chaos, humanity vanishes, leaving only winter behind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Under the Demon Lord's age of chaos, humanity vanishes, leaving only winter behind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Under the Demon Lord's age of chaos, humanity vanishes, leaving only winter behind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Tree that whispers of the future stands broken, silent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Tree that whispers of the future stands broken, silent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Tree that whispers of the future stands broken, silent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was the end of the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was the end of the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was the end of the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It should have been.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It should have been.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It should have been.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The winter wind that freezes everything comes to a halt, and sprouts emerge from the earth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The winter wind that freezes everything comes to a halt, and sprouts emerge from the earth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The winter wind that freezes everything comes to a halt, and sprouts emerge from the earth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A new sun rises, and new life begins to stir.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A new sun rises, and new life begins to stir.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A new sun rises, and new life begins to stir.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And at its center is a girl embracing the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And at its center is a girl embracing the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And at its center is a girl embracing the Golden Tree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What brings you here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What brings you here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What brings you here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to meet Ecclesia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to meet Ecclesia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to meet Ecclesia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She will be back soon, so please wait here for a while.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She will be back soon, so please wait here for a while.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She will be back soon, so please wait here for a while.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ecclesia is praying right now in the place she loves most.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ecclesia is praying right now in the place she loves most.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ecclesia is praying right now in the place she loves most.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sunniest place in the Promised Land. The hill of the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sunniest place in the Promised Land. The hill of the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sunniest place in the Promised Land. The hill of the Golden Tree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are Ecclesia's father... aren't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are Ecclesia's father... aren't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are Ecclesia's father... aren't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How much do you know about her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How much do you know about her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How much do you know about her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: More than the memories of the <color=#ffd34c>other being</color> within you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: More than the memories of the <color=#ffd34c>other being</color> within you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: More than the memories of the <color=#ffd34c>other being</color> within you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You know Nequitia?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You know Nequitia?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You know Nequitia?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know many things.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know many things.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know many things.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Including the fact that the fates of two people are bound within you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Including the fact that the fates of two people are bound within you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Including the fact that the fates of two people are bound within you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that neither can accept the other, so both choose to look away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that neither can accept the other, so both choose to look away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that neither can accept the other, so both choose to look away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Then do you also know how we ended up here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Then do you also know how we ended up here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Then do you also know how we ended up here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is only one reason outsiders arrive here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is only one reason outsiders arrive here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is only one reason outsiders arrive here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because the Promised Land wished it so.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because the Promised Land wished it so.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because the Promised Land wished it so.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I hope you, too, will find life in the Promised Land fulfilling.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I hope you, too, will find life in the Promised Land fulfilling.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I hope you, too, will find life in the Promised Land fulfilling.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I'm enjoying a miracle-like peace I haven't felt in a long time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I'm enjoying a miracle-like peace I haven't felt in a long time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I'm enjoying a miracle-like peace I haven't felt in a long time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: More than anything, I feel an undeserved gratitude for being able to see my mother again like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: More than anything, I feel an undeserved gratitude for being able to see my mother again like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: More than anything, I feel an undeserved gratitude for being able to see my mother again like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I have to go back. I can't keep dreaming of miracles forever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I have to go back. I can't keep dreaming of miracles forever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I have to go back. I can't keep dreaming of miracles forever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Promised Land does not bar the way of those with resolve.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Promised Land does not bar the way of those with resolve.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Promised Land does not bar the way of those with resolve.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But do not drag that child into it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But do not drag that child into it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But do not drag that child into it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you planning to do with Ecclesia?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you planning to do with Ecclesia?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you planning to do with Ecclesia?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As her father, I am only letting that child, weary from a long journey, rest in peace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As her father, I am only letting that child, weary from a long journey, rest in peace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As her father, I am only letting that child, weary from a long journey, rest in peace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Demon Lord Thagirion will come to our world before long.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Demon Lord Thagirion will come to our world before long.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Demon Lord Thagirion will come to our world before long.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're from Elysion, then you know how dangerous a Demon Lord is. That's why I need your help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're from Elysion, then you know how dangerous a Demon Lord is. That's why I need your help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're from Elysion, then you know how dangerous a Demon Lord is. That's why I need your help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you mean to use Ecclesia as a sacrifice to stop that Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you mean to use Ecclesia as a sacrifice to stop that Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you mean to use Ecclesia as a sacrifice to stop that Demon Lord?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not a sacrifice. We're trying to join forces because our purpose is the same.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not a sacrifice. We're trying to join forces because our purpose is the same.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not a sacrifice. We're trying to join forces because our purpose is the same.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though it seemed like she herself had lost the memory of ever fighting alongside us... if I help her somehow, she'll remember.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though it seemed like she herself had lost the memory of ever fighting alongside us... if I help her somehow, she'll remember.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though it seemed like she herself had lost the memory of ever fighting alongside us... if I help her somehow, she'll remember.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Help her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Help her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Help her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That child has fought for a very long time to stop Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That child has fought for a very long time to stop Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That child has fought for a very long time to stop Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a lingering obsession, she wandered countless worlds through an eternity, and her soul was damaged beyond repair.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a lingering obsession, she wandered countless worlds through an eternity, and her soul was damaged beyond repair.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a lingering obsession, she wandered countless worlds through an eternity, and her soul was damaged beyond repair.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you truly wish to help her, then do not drag her into conflict any longer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you truly wish to help her, then do not drag her into conflict any longer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you truly wish to help her, then do not drag her into conflict any longer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I understand what you're trying to say.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I understand what you're trying to say.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I understand what you're trying to say.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But without her help, our world will collapse just like yours did.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But without her help, our world will collapse just like yours did.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But without her help, our world will collapse just like yours did.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The end of a world is an ordained course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The end of a world is an ordained course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The end of a world is an ordained course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is like pruning a branch that is no longer needed. No matter how many times you cut it, the next branch will grow again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is like pruning a branch that is no longer needed. No matter how many times you cut it, the next branch will grow again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is like pruning a branch that is no longer needed. No matter how many times you cut it, the next branch will grow again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think Ecclesia feels the same way?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think Ecclesia feels the same way?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think Ecclesia feels the same way?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone with enough pride to fight through an eternity at the cost of her own soul would give up just because she's tired?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone with enough pride to fight through an eternity at the cost of her own soul would give up just because she's tired?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone with enough pride to fight through an eternity at the cost of her own soul would give up just because she's tired?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're going to shackle her memories however you please and force her to live a false life?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're going to shackle her memories however you please and force her to live a false life?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're going to shackle her memories however you please and force her to live a false life?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because that is the only way to save her soul.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because that is the only way to save her soul.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because that is the only way to save her soul.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hear the Promised Land grants the wishes of its residents.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hear the Promised Land grants the wishes of its residents.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hear the Promised Land grants the wishes of its residents.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So is your wish to return Shadow Mors to the Ecclesia you loved?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So is your wish to return Shadow Mors to the Ecclesia you loved?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So is your wish to return Shadow Mors to the Ecclesia you loved?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
No. My wish is
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
No. My wish is
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
No. My wish is
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Father!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Father!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Father!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ecclesia? Back already?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ecclesia? Back already?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ecclesia? Back already?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look, Father.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look, Father.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look, Father.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This fell from the sky.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This fell from the sky.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This fell from the sky.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A snowflake...? It doesn't melt even in my hand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A snowflake...? It doesn't melt even in my hand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A snowflake...? It doesn't melt even in my hand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? I didn't even realize we had a guest...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? I didn't even realize we had a guest...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? I didn't even realize we had a guest...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll hurry and gather some fruit!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll hurry and gather some fruit!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll hurry and gather some fruit!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That won't be necessary. She'll be leaving soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That won't be necessary. She'll be leaving soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That won't be necessary. She'll be leaving soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... is that so?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... is that so?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... is that so?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Hey, I
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Hey, I
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Hey, I
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But we cannot send a guest of our home away empty-handed...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But we cannot send a guest of our home away empty-handed...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But we cannot send a guest of our home away empty-handed...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why don't you accompany her and bring in today's harvest together? Is that acceptable to you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why don't you accompany her and bring in today's harvest together? Is that acceptable to you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why don't you accompany her and bring in today's harvest together? Is that acceptable to you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes! Then I'll go fetch the pole pruners!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes! Then I'll go fetch the pole pruners!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes! Then I'll go fetch the pole pruners!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I thought you'd try to stop me from meeting her. This is unexpected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I thought you'd try to stop me from meeting her. This is unexpected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I thought you'd try to stop me from meeting her. This is unexpected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A priest of the Promised Land does not sow the seeds of conflict.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A priest of the Promised Land does not sow the seeds of conflict.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A priest of the Promised Land does not sow the seeds of conflict.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have conveyed my will clearly enough, so from here on, I must leave it to your choice and that child's.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have conveyed my will clearly enough, so from here on, I must leave it to your choice and that child's.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have conveyed my will clearly enough, so from here on, I must leave it to your choice and that child's.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Promise me just one thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Promise me just one thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Promise me just one thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you cannot persuade that child by today, then promise you will trouble her no longer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you cannot persuade that child by today, then promise you will trouble her no longer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you cannot persuade that child by today, then promise you will trouble her no longer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hn-hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hn-hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hn-hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come up quickly!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come up quickly!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come up quickly!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're... really good at climbing hills.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're... really good at climbing hills.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're... really good at climbing hills.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I climb this path every day, so of course I am.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I climb this path every day, so of course I am.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I climb this path every day, so of course I am.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it's my first time going out to harvest with someone else, so it's even more delightful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it's my first time going out to harvest with someone else, so it's even more delightful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it's my first time going out to harvest with someone else, so it's even more delightful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not like that! Put a little more strength into the end and cut it in one go!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not like that! Put a little more strength into the end and cut it in one go!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not like that! Put a little more strength into the end and cut it in one go!

root.m_Talk_ENG: L-like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: L-like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: L-like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Got it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Got it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Got it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well done.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well done.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well done.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Fruit on the high branches really is hard to pick.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Fruit on the high branches really is hard to pick.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Fruit on the high branches really is hard to pick.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It feels like we could just take the fruit that's fallen to the ground.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It feels like we could just take the fruit that's fallen to the ground.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It feels like we could just take the fruit that's fallen to the ground.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The fruit a tree lets fall is the tree's way of repaying the Promised Land.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The fruit a tree lets fall is the tree's way of repaying the Promised Land.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The fruit a tree lets fall is the tree's way of repaying the Promised Land.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: So we mustn't touch it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So we mustn't touch it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So we mustn't touch it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The tree is repaying it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The tree is repaying it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The tree is repaying it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The earth gave it precious nourishment, so the tree diligently grows it and gives it back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The earth gave it precious nourishment, so the tree diligently grows it and gives it back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The earth gave it precious nourishment, so the tree diligently grows it and gives it back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, now that the same day repeats itself, perhaps it means nothing at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, now that the same day repeats itself, perhaps it means nothing at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, now that the same day repeats itself, perhaps it means nothing at all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But someday, in a perfected Promised Land, we must not forget how to live in preparation for tomorrow instead of today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But someday, in a perfected Promised Land, we must not forget how to live in preparation for tomorrow instead of today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But someday, in a perfected Promised Land, we must not forget how to live in preparation for tomorrow instead of today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you don't intend to live only for today forever, either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you don't intend to live only for today forever, either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you don't intend to live only for today forever, either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To greet tomorrow... that is the wish of all the residents of the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To greet tomorrow... that is the wish of all the residents of the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To greet tomorrow... that is the wish of all the residents of the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because it is the one wish the Promised Land can't grant.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because it is the one wish the Promised Land can't grant.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because it is the one wish the Promised Land can't grant.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ecclesia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ecclesia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ecclesia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know what it's like outside the Promised Land?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know what it's like outside the Promised Land?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know what it's like outside the Promised Land?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Beyond the Promised Land lies an eternal winter. I was told it is the trace of the end left behind by the Demon Lord Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Beyond the Promised Land lies an eternal winter. I was told it is the trace of the end left behind by the Demon Lord Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Beyond the Promised Land lies an eternal winter. I was told it is the trace of the end left behind by the Demon Lord Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not just a trace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not just a trace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not just a trace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Out there, even now, there are still people fighting the Demon Lord to survive that winter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Out there, even now, there are still people fighting the Demon Lord to survive that winter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Out there, even now, there are still people fighting the Demon Lord to survive that winter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That can't be...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That can't be...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That can't be...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That can't be true. Surely every world except the Promised Land was long ago destroyed by Thagirion...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That can't be true. Surely every world except the Promised Land was long ago destroyed by Thagirion...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That can't be true. Surely every world except the Promised Land was long ago destroyed by Thagirion...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Thagirion had truly destroyed the world completely, then how could a place like the Promised Land remain this intact?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Thagirion had truly destroyed the world completely, then how could a place like the Promised Land remain this intact?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Thagirion had truly destroyed the world completely, then how could a place like the Promised Land remain this intact?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know why, but this one thing is certain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know why, but this one thing is certain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know why, but this one thing is certain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we fail to stop the Demon Lord Thagirion, this place too will soon collapse by her hand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we fail to stop the Demon Lord Thagirion, this place too will soon collapse by her hand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we fail to stop the Demon Lord Thagirion, this place too will soon collapse by her hand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Promised Land... by Thagirion's hand...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Promised Land... by Thagirion's hand...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Promised Land... by Thagirion's hand...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A dead Helgon becomes a monster called a Shadow, wandering with nothing left but a lingering obsession.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A dead Helgon becomes a monster called a Shadow, wandering with nothing left but a lingering obsession.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A dead Helgon becomes a monster called a Shadow, wandering with nothing left but a lingering obsession.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even after ending up that way, you were still someone who never lost your pride and struggled to stop Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even after ending up that way, you were still someone who never lost your pride and struggled to stop Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even after ending up that way, you were still someone who never lost your pride and struggled to stop Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just because your memories are gone doesn't mean that pride is gone too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just because your memories are gone doesn't mean that pride is gone too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just because your memories are gone doesn't mean that pride is gone too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what kind of person I was in the past...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what kind of person I was in the past...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what kind of person I was in the past...

root.m_Talk_ENG: but to me right now, nothing is more precious than the time I spend with my father.
root.m_Talk_DEU: but to me right now, nothing is more precious than the time I spend with my father.
root.m_Talk_FRA: but to me right now, nothing is more precious than the time I spend with my father.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't wish to let go of what I have now in order to protect people I don't even remember.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't wish to let go of what I have now in order to protect people I don't even remember.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't wish to let go of what I have now in order to protect people I don't even remember.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's not your own thought! Someone is covering your eyes and ears with false memories!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's not your own thought! Someone is covering your eyes and ears with false memories!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's not your own thought! Someone is covering your eyes and ears with false memories!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe that Veles guy did it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe that Veles guy did it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe that Veles guy did it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do not insult my father!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do not insult my father!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do not insult my father!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please don't call this Promised Land I love... a lie.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please don't call this Promised Land I love... a lie.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please don't call this Promised Land I love... a lie.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it... snowing right now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it... snowing right now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it... snowing right now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: More is falling than before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: More is falling than before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: More is falling than before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... it has never snowed at this hour before...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... it has never snowed at this hour before...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... it has never snowed at this hour before...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's never fallen before?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's never fallen before?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's never fallen before?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The snowflakes don't melt, even in my hand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The snowflakes don't melt, even in my hand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The snowflakes don't melt, even in my hand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What... is this supposed to be a sign of?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What... is this supposed to be a sign of?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What... is this supposed to be a sign of?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Within the silence at the end of autumn, the Promised Land shall at last be complete.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...
root.m_Talk_DEU: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...
root.m_Talk_FRA: As we welcome the first snowfall we will encounter at the end of eternity...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thus shall the promise of the Promised Land be fulfilled.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The time promised by the Promised Land is coming.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The time promised by the Promised Land is coming.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The time promised by the Promised Land is coming.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the fact that it is snowing now is the proof of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the fact that it is snowing now is the proof of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the fact that it is snowing now is the proof of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: As if a cold awl buried deep within my subconscious had twitched.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As if a cold awl buried deep within my subconscious had twitched.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As if a cold awl buried deep within my subconscious had twitched.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A strange yet familiar sensation gouges straight through the center of my heart.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A strange yet familiar sensation gouges straight through the center of my heart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A strange yet familiar sensation gouges straight through the center of my heart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fear, hatred, kinship, guilt, regret, pity. And the massive wave of confusion born from all those clashing emotions...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fear, hatred, kinship, guilt, regret, pity. And the massive wave of confusion born from all those clashing emotions...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fear, hatred, kinship, guilt, regret, pity. And the massive wave of confusion born from all those clashing emotions...

root.m_Talk_ENG: pulled a name that had long lain sunken at the bottom of my memories up to the surface.
root.m_Talk_DEU: pulled a name that had long lain sunken at the bottom of my memories up to the surface.
root.m_Talk_FRA: pulled a name that had long lain sunken at the bottom of my memories up to the surface.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Audra.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Audra.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Audra.
